view.title: Validate explicit UC need #7
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for gap time calculation and enforcement.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 7 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for gap time calculation and enforcement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for gap time calculation and enforcement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'gap time calculation and enforcement', but the evidence does not provide any specific checks or confirmations regarding the enforcement of the 5-hour gap between bookings. While the linked use case mentions this requirement, there is no concrete evidence presented that explicitly confirms whether this requirement is enforced or if any gaps exist in the current bookings. This lack of direct evidence leads to the conclusion that the validation is inconclusive.
